arch_family: multi-camera -> view fusion -> trajectory planner + future-state aux (camera-only end-to-end driving)
notes: Hand-authored to mirror the official AutoE2E architecture figure. Loss/learning nodes inferred from the training-time outputs (confidence < 0.6) since the loss code lives outside the model module.

nodes.title: 7 cameras + 1 Map Tile
nodes.desc: 8 surround-view camera frames (incl. a rendered map tile)

nodes.title: Egomotion history
nodes.desc: 6.4s past motion: speed, accel, yaw, yaw-rate at 10Hz

nodes.title: Visual scene history
nodes.desc: buffered compressed scene features over the past 6.4s

nodes.title: Backbone — SwinV2-Tiny
nodes.desc: extract multi-scale visual features per camera

nodes.title: Feature Fusion
nodes.desc: combine multi-scale features into a single fused feature map

nodes.title: Concat inputs
nodes.desc: flatten fused features + egomotion + visual history into one vector

nodes.title: Driving Policy
nodes.desc: decode the future trajectory from current visual features, past visual features and egomotion history

nodes.title: Future Trajectory Prediction
nodes.desc: tuple of future acceleration + curvature over a 6.4s horizon at 10Hz

nodes.title: Compressed Visual Scene Representation
nodes.desc: a compact feature representation of the current visual scene
